recap: Fragment 1 covered launch week: self-service account block/reactivate + email-OTP web login, an unawaited-insert bug that instantly logged users out, PostHog analytics, and milestone transactions finalizing early, fixed across all bot platforms. Fragment 2: Peter built the entire admin dashboard overnight in one sitting - 10 pages, dispute auto-routing, SLA reminders, fraud queue - then fixed two same-night bugs (TS build break, cross-domain cookie lockout). Fragment 3: a few days later he gave all 26 admin pages a real navy design system, rebuilt the dispute detail page into a 3-column layout, and quietly added his first real test suite (66 tests) in the same sitting. Next chapter: badge cards, reviews, and a run of memory-leak fixes.
